subcodes.first_line: Let not the reproaches of the foolish cause you to waver. Censure is the very essence of felicity and the reality of heavenly bestowal, though they speak with reckless impetuosity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از شماتت بيخردان فتور نياريد ملامت عين سعادتست و حقيقت موهبت و چون بتهوّر سخن رانند
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Imam Husayn, @newspapers and the media; publications
